dashboard: Main School Overview. Real-time stats on total enrollment, active staff, fee collection progress, and pending applications. Central hub for administrators.
admission-settings: Admissions Configuration. Manage portal status (Open/Closed), set application fees, define intake dates, and configure entrance exam requirements.
applications: Applicant Management. Review prospective student data, documents, and entrance exam performance. Handle approval, rejection, and final admission letter generation.
confirm-payments: Payment Verification. Confirm manual bank transfers for application fees, tuition, and other payments before they reflect on student accounts.
assignments: Academic Assignments. Teachers post and grade student take-home work, set deadlines, and track submission rates.
attendance: Attendance Monitoring. Track daily presence for students and staff. Includes 'print' sub-module for generating physical attendance registers.
biometric-stations: Biometric Hardware Management. Configure fingerprint or facial recognition scanners used for secure staff clock-in and student identity verification.
cbt-timetable: CBT Exam Scheduling. Specifically for Computer Based Testing. Manage lab allocations, student batches, and time slots.
class-timetable: Academic Timetable. Manage daily lesson schedules, period allocations, and teacher classroom assignments.
broadsheet: Class Performance Broadsheet. A comprehensive view of all student scores (CA and Exams) across all subjects for a specific class and term.
classes: Classroom Management. Define arms (e.g., JSS1-A, JSS1-B), assign class teachers, and track student placement.
clubs: Extra-curricular Management. Manage student societies, clubs, and leadership roles within the school.
communications: School Messaging. Send SMS, Emails, and App notifications to parents, staff, or specific student groups.
departments: Administrative Departments. Define organizational structures for staff (e.g., Mathematics Dept, Administration, Science Dept).
exams: CBT Exam Management. The core module for creating exams, setting pass marks, passcodes, and reviewing student scores. Includes specialized views for New Exam, Exam Halls, and Passcodes.
fee-payments: Payment Records. Detailed history of all successful student transactions. Searchable by student, session, or fee type.
fee-types: Financial Configuration. Define school fees (Tuition, Development, Uniforms, Lab Fees) and their amounts per class level.
fees: General Finance Hub. Overview of revenue, debtor lists, and financial health reporting.
gallery: School Media. Manage photo and video galleries for school events, categorized by groups.
grades: Grading System. Define score ranges (e.g., A: 70-100, B: 60-69) and their corresponding points and remarks for term reports.
leaves: Staff Leave Management. Process leave requests, track holidays, and manage staff absence.
loans: Staff Welfare. Manage staff salary advances and loans, tracking repayment schedules and balances.
past-questions: Educational Resources. Manage archives of previous years' exam questions for student revision.
periods: Time Configuration. Define the start and end times for academic periods (e.g., Period 1: 8am-8:40am).
question-bank: CBT Content Hub. Detailed subject-level management of questions, including bulk uploads and AI-assisted question generation.
salary-grades: Payroll Configuration. Define base salaries and allowances for different staff levels/steps.
salary-payments: Payroll Management. Process monthly salary disbursements for all active staff.
schools: Division Management. Configure the primary divisions: Nursery, Primary, Junior Secondary, and Senior Secondary.
sessions: Academic Calendar. Manage Sessions (e.g., 2023/2024) and Terms (First, Second, Third), marking the current active period.
settings: Global Preferences. General system configuration, logo management, and administrative user permissions.
staff: Staff Profiles. Complete records for all employees, including biodata, qualifications, and employment history. Includes 'register-new' for onboarding.
students: Student Profiles. Central database for all admitted students, including academic history, parent contacts, and status. Includes 'register-new' for direct enrollment.
subject-groups: Curriculum Organization. Group related subjects together for reporting and timetable management.
subjects: Subject Management. Manage the list of subjects offered, schemes of work, score-sheet entries, and exam links for each subject.
external-exams: External Results. Track student performance in national/international exams like WAEC, NECO, or JAMB.
result-entry-approvals: Academic Oversight. Principal or HOD reviews and approves teacher score entries before they are finalized for report cards.
ai: Lumina AI Lab. Specialized interface for advanced AI interactions, report generations, and automated content creation.
